free_text: Main ref.
thesis materials are presented in report.
Energy spectra of radioactive neutron sources
Activation for the indium and gold measurements
3. x 3. inch NaI(Tl) well-type crystal for
the indium and gold measurements.
Makrofol (polycarbonate foil) track detector
for fission fragments.
Decay gammas for the indium and gold measurements
Fission fragments.
.Data taken from INDC-430,1970.
.Corrections for self-absorption of gamma-rays in gold
sample, for anisotropy of the neutron source, for
detection efficiency, for decay or number of tracks,
and for effective distance between neutron source
and sample have been applied.
.In the measurements with the Sb-124+Be neutron source
on gold, indium and plutonium a factor of 0.95 +-0.02
was applied to correct for the 380 keV neutrons.
.No information given.
CN.
SD: Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Corrections according last EXFOR rules and Dict.
SD: Ref. INDC-430,1970 was added. SAMPLE
and INC-SOURCE moved from Subent 001 to Subents 002-28.
INC-SPECT deleted from Subents 002-028 (full info is
given in INC-SOURCE).  Multiple reaction formalism was
Subents 003,011,016 were splitted following INC-SOURCE.
EN-DUMMY -> KT-DUMMY in all Subents where Cf-252 is
neutron source. INC-SOURCE update in Subents 002-0028.
Am-241+Be, pelleted mixture of Am-oxide + Be in
stainless steel container; 48.5 x 22.4 mm (h x diam.);
amount of radioactive material - 3Ci; neutron emission
rate 8.6 x 10**6 n/sec; anisotropy factor 1.039.
Pu-239+Be, alloy of Pu + Be in tantalum or
stainless steel container; 52.3 x 39.5 mm (h x diam.);
amount of radioactive  material - 5Ci; neutron emission
rate 1.0 x 10**7n/sec; anisotropy factor 1.052.
Ra-226+Be, pressed mechanical mixture of Ra+Be
in monel or platinum container; 15.4x15.0mm(h x diam.);
amount of radioactive material - 0.1Ci; neutron
emission  rate 1.5x10**6 n/sec;anisotropy factor 1.014.
Cm-242+Be, pelleted mixture of Cm-oxide + Be in
stainless steel container; 19.4 x 17.4 mm (h x diam.);
amount of radioactive material - 1Ci;  neutron emission
rate 3.5 x 10**6 n/sec; anisotropy factor 1.012.
.Natural indium sphere 1 cm in diameter.
detector without surrounding by B-10 sphere
detector with surrounding by 2.2 g/cm2 B-10 sphere
.Decay data taken from text, cross section
data from table VI.1 of INDC-430,1970.
REACTION code and DECAY-DATA. Multiple reaction
formalism applied. Description of FLAG was changed.
Mock-Fission (Po-210+Be+B+F) neutron sources.
Mock-Fission source in stainless steel container;
17.0 x 15.0 mm (h x diam.); amount of radioactive
material - 1Ci.
Mock-Fission neutron source is a mixture of Po, Be, B,
F (and Li) in the correct proportions constitutes a
neutron source, the spectrum of which resembles an
uranium fission spectrum.
.Natural indium sphere 1 cm in diameter.
detector without surrounding by B-10 sphere
detector with surrounding by 2.2 g/cm2 B-10 sphere
.Decay data taken from text, cross section
data from table VI.1 of INDC-430,1970

changed. Part of data were moved to Subent 029.
